summary.headline: ADM to form North American animal feed joint venture with Alltech.
summary.narrative_summary: Archer-Daniels-Midland Company announced a definitive agreement to form a North American animal feed joint venture with Alltech. The venture will be majority-owned by Alltech and governed by a board with equal representation from each company. Alltech will contribute its U.S.-based Hubbard Feeds and Canada-based Masterfeeds businesses, while ADM will contribute its 11 U.S. complete feed mills. The transaction is expected to close and launch in the first quarter of 2026, with no material impact on ADM's 2025 financial results.

drivers: diversification into higher margin specialty ingredients

facilities_mentioned.name: Hubbard Feeds
facilities_mentioned.context: contributed by Alltech to the joint venture

extraction_notes: The filing primarily discusses a joint venture formation rather than financial results or earnings. Numbers and financial details are not provided in the text.
